ideation: This animation sequence simulates the act of typing on a keyboard. The movement will focus on the hands moving rhythmically across the keyboard, expressing focus and engagement. Each frame will be distinct, showing a clear change in position. I will use the examples to guide the joint angles and ensure smooth transitions.  The left arm will remain relatively still to provide contrast and a sense of grounding. Frame 1 will show both arms resting on a desk, as if ready to type. Frame 2 will show the right hand moving downward and slightly to the left, as if striking a key. Frame 3 will show the right hand returning to its resting position, while the left hand moves to strike a key. Frame 4 will show both hands returning to their resting positions. This rhythmic motion will convey the act of typing.

frames.beat: right hand strikes a key, left arm steady
left hand strikes a key, right arm rests
both arms return to resting position
